items.text:
There are plaques with text in an unknown language,
glyphs that don't look like our writing at all,
but I just ... know what they mean.

there's no slightest impression that
I should not understand these squiggles.

The signs make clear that
they constructed this place for strangers to find,

which explains why these parameters
made such a big bump in the sounding-outs:
they are advertising this place.

There's something ahead ...
I don't know where it'll take me.

But of course I'm going through.
Ever onward. Ever forward.
